zh.lifeSummary: Robert de la Lynde I是Sir Robert de la Lynde和Mrs. Robert de la Lynde的兒子，於1140年出生在英國多瑟特文特爾布恩 賀林斯同。他於1179年與Mrs Robert De La Lynde在英國英格蘭多瑟特文特爾布恩 賀林斯同結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1185年在英國多瑟特文特爾布恩 可倫斯同享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: Lynde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Lind
meanings: Scandinavian, English, and Dutch: topographic name for someone who lived by a lime tree, Scandinavian and Middle English lind. As a Swedish name, it is often of ornamental origin.
North German and Danish: habitational name from any of various places called with Lind ‘lime tree’.
South German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for a gentle, mild, tolerant man, from Middle High German lint, linde, Yiddish lind ‘gentle, mild’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Robert de la Lynde I was born in 1140, in Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, England as the son of Sir Robert de la Lynde and Mrs. Robert de la Lynde. He married Mrs Robert De La Lynde in 1179, in Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1185, in Winterbourne Clenstone, Dorset, England, at the age of 45.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de la Lynde Iは1140年にイギリスドールセトウィンテルボウルン ハーリングストーンでSir Robert de la LyndeとMrs. Robert de la Lyndeの息子として生まれた。1179年にイギリスイギリスドールセトウィンテルボウルン ハーリングストーンでMrs Robert De La Lyndeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1185年にイギリスドールセトウィンテルボウルン クレンストーンで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de la Lynde I(은)는 1140년 영국 도르세트 윈터보우른 허링스톤에서 Sir Robert de la Lynde(와)과 Mrs. Robert de la Lynde의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1179년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 윈터보우른 허링스톤에서 Mrs Robert De La Lynde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1185년 영국 도르세트 윈터보우른 클렌스톤에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert de la Lynde I родился в 1140 г. в местности винтирбурн хиррингстоун, дорсет, Англия. Его родителей звали Sir Robert de la Lynde и Mrs. Robert de la Lynde. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Robert De La Lynde в 1179 г. в местности винтирбурн хиррингстоун, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1185 г. в местности винтирбурн кленстоун, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.
